title: Tritonia flabellifolia
taxonomy: Tritonia flabellifolia belongs to the family Iridaceae, which is commonly known as the iris family. This classification places Tritonia flabellifolia within the group of flowering plants that are characterized by their showy, six-petaled flowers. The genus Tritonia is further divided into several species, with Tritonia flabellifolia being one of the most well-known species within this genus. The classification of Tritonia flabellifolia helps to identify its unique characteristics and distinguish it from other species within the same family. By understanding its classification, botanists and researchers can gain a deeper understanding of the plant's evolutionary history and relationships to other species within the Iridaceae family.
